Trusted Houston Demolition Experts

Houston Demolition Done Right

We tear down so you can build up. Serving Greater Houston with precision demolition since 2012.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Marcus T.

Apex demolished our 1962 Meyerland home after flood damage. They preserved the oak tree roots we wanted to keep and had the lot cleared in 2 days despite Houston's summer rains. Even recommended a foundation company for our rebuild.

L
Lisa R.

Our Katy backyard looks brand new after their pool removal. They explained how the clay soil would settle over time and came back to regrade when promised. No more mosquito breeding ground!

J
James W.

Tore down our old Montrose retail space without disturbing the tattoo shop next door. Their dust containment was impressive—neighbors didn't even know we were demolishing until they saw the empty lot.

Y
Yolanda S.

Gutted our River Oaks condo down to studs in 3 days. They found original brick behind drywall we didn't know existed and preserved it perfectly for our designer. Worth every penny.

Additional Demolition Services

Apex Demolition — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every demolition project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Demolition Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific demolition needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Houston & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Houston, TX and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Sugar Land Katy The Woodlands Pearland League City Spring Conroe Friendswood
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our demolition services.

How do you handle asbestos in older Houston homes?

We're HEPA-certified for asbestos abatement, required for most Inner Loop homes built before 1980. Testing is included in all estimates.

Can you demolish just part of my house?

Yes—we frequently handle room additions and garage conversions across Houston's varied housing types.

Built on Houston Values

Get a same-day estimate for your Houston demolition project.

Let's Begin →
